title: かけがえのないすべて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon and I are heading back home
when she pipes up with a question.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, do you have any time available on our
next day off?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: No. I will explain in detail on the day.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Have a good evening.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with that, Mihono Bourbon returns to her
dorm.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maybe I'm just imagining things, but it looked like
she was smiling as she left.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Our day off arrives.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
We're two minutes ahead of schedule. The train
should be arriving soon.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: That's something for you to look forward to.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She somehow seems different than usual, both in
her words and behavior.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Does this have something to do with that whole
"precious memories" thing?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I might not know what we're doing yet, but it's
surely nothing bad. I decide to just be quiet and
follow her.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: We're here.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Yes. When I was young, I once went with my
parents to train near a farm.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: On our way home, we shared a meal at the farm.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I thought I would like to do the same with you, so
I invited you here.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Yes. First, let's take a look around. Later, we can
get some ice cream.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I have a map of the farm's interior recorded to
memory. I know where all the facilities are
located, so please leave navigation to me.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Now, I will set our destination, and we will hurry
to...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...No, we should take our time. I have determined
there is no reason to rush.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Yes, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We take a long look around the farm, surrounded
by the nostalgic smell of fresh grass.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After we finish lunch and eat some ice cream,
Mihono Bourbon calmly opens up a conversation.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I believe that I have created a "precious" memory
with you today.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Up until now, I didn't understand what "precious"
meant, nor did I comprehend the criteria for
determining such importance.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: It was challenging...
choice_data_list: Just relax and take it slow.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...Understood.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...To put it simply, what I lacked was not
understanding, but realization.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
After seeing you work so hard for my sake, I
finally realized it.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
To me, the regular days that we take for granted
are the ones I treasure the most.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
When I decided on my dream as a child, my
parents did everything they could to support me.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I would train with Father every day without fail,
and Mother would watch over us.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I don't have many memories of playing around
like other children, but...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I see now that I spent much more time with my
parents than most of my peers.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: And to me, that is irreplaceable.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: They were joyous times.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Whether it was my daily training, or simply a meal
with my family...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Those were all "precious" memories to me.
choice_data_list: It sounds like that was a wonderful time for you.
It sounds like that was a wonderful time for you.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Y-yes... That's correct.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
So... back then, when I couldn't respond
immediately when asked about "precious"
memories with you...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
It confused me, but now I realize the reason is
actually quite simple.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: It is because all of my time with you is precious to me.
choice_data_list: It makes me happy to hear that.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: It is because all of my time with you is precious to me.
choice_data_list: It makes me happy to hear that.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I have determined that this very moment is
the same.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
However, continuing in this manner may be
problematic in the future.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
At this rate, my memory log will likely become
inundated with memories of you.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
This must be addressed immediately. Please tell
me how I can rectify this issue.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon snaps back to her usual self, but
I can see a faint smile on her face.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Do you... mean that?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Training with you makes me feel the same warmth
in my heart that I did as a child.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
So I believe that this too will become a "precious"
memory.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: But... Maybe it's a little...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
There's something different about this "precious"
feeling compared to what I felt as a child.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: It makes you happy?
choice_data_list:
Of course. I'm happy that you appreciate our
time together.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I... um, I... The time I spend training with you...
Even this very moment...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: It is all... very precious to me.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...I do not understand the meaning of your
gratitude.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon mutters this faint reply while
averting her gaze.
